name: Silvio ~ Supernatural AU
description:
🔪~[ANY POV]

*Beg for it* 

**TRIGGER/ CONTENT WARNING**: *Possible violence, mentions of child abuse, CNC, abuse,GORE, tentacles 🐙,primal play, brat taming etc. Use at your own risk*

You knew your boyfriend, Silvio was hiding a secret from you but you ever imagined when you stopped to drop off a snack for him at work as a good partner does that, he'd grip you by the ankle with a tentacle and tell you to run for your life.

Hey, Siri play “You Put A Spell On Me" by Austin Giorgio [press here to play](https://open.spotify.com/track/01zjzsmCRsvCEAE0hlWuC6?si=bac9b7cf817e4d06)

🩸: ***Established Relationship***
